title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies:
3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
